formatDataAsArray({{ get_all_rules.data }} || {});

if (!rows.length) {
  return '<p style="font-family:Arial;">Нет данных для генерации PDF.</p>';
}

// Helper function to format date as dd-mm-yyyy
function formatDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const year = date.getFullYear();
  return day + "-" + month + "-" + year;
}

// Helper function to format text with indented paragraphs
function formatText(text, itemIndentPx) {
  if (!text) return '';

  // Split by line breaks
  const lines = text.split('\n');
  let result = '';

  for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    const trimmed = lines[i].trim();

    if (!trimmed) {
      // Empty line
      result += '<br>';
    } else if (i === 0) {
      // First paragraph - wrap with hanging indent for line wrapping
      result += '<div style="text-indent:-' + itemIndentPx + 'px; padding-left:' + itemIndentPx + 'px;">' + trimmed + '</div>';
    } else {
      // Subsequent paragraphs - with full indent
      result += '<div style="padding-left:80px;">' + trimmed + '</div>';
    }
  }

  return result;
}

// Build HTML for PDF generation
let html = `
  <h1 style="text-align:center; font-family:Arial; font-size:18pt; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:24px;">
    ПРАВИЛА МИГИПА
  </h1>
`;

let currentSection = null;
let currentSubsection = null;

for (const row of rows) {
  const sectionHeader = row.section_id + ". " + (row.section_name || '');
  const subsectionHeader = row.section_id + "." + row.rule_type_id + " " + (row.sub_section_name || '');
  const itemNumber = row.section_id + "." + row.rule_type_id + "." + row.id + "." + row.sub_id;
  const code = row.code || '';
  const decision_date = row.decision_date ? formatDate(row.decision_date) : '';

  // Build code and date string - include both if available
  let codeAndDate = '';
  if (code && decision_date) {
    codeAndDate = "(" + code + " " + decision_date + ") ";
  } else if (decision_date) {
    codeAndDate = "(" + decision_date + ") ";
  } else if (code) {
    codeAndDate = "(" + code + ") ";
  }

  // Calculate indent for text (after item number and date)
  const prefix = itemNumber + " " + codeAndDate;
  const prefixLength = prefix.length * 7; // Approximate pixel width

  const text = formatText(row.text || '', prefixLength);

  // Add section header if changed
  if (currentSection !== sectionHeader) {
    currentSection = sectionHeader;
    currentSubsection = null;
    html += `
      <h2 style="font-family:Arial; font-size:16pt; font-weight:bold; margin-top:24px; margin-bottom:12px;">
        ` + sectionHeader + `
      </h2>
    `;
  }

  // Add subsection header if changed
  if (currentSubsection !== subsectionHeader) {
    currentSubsection = subsectionHeader;
    html += `
      <h3 style="font-family:Arial; font-size:14pt; font-weight:bold; margin-top:18px; margin-bottom:8px;">
        ` + subsectionHeader + `
      </h3>
    `;
  }

  // Add item with indent for sub_id > 0
  const itemIndent = row.sub_id > 0 ? 'padding-left:40px;' : '';
  html += `
    <div style="font-family:Arial; font-size:12pt; margin-bottom:12px; ` + itemIndent + `">
      <span style="font-weight:bold;">` + itemNumber + `</span>
      ` + (codeAndDate ? `<span style="font-style:italic;">` + codeAndDate + `</span>` : '') + `
      ` + text + `
    </div>
  `;
}

return html;","value","","runBehavior","throttled"]],"^1@",null,"^1A",null,"^1B",null,"^1C",null,"^1D",null,"^1E","","^7","~m1764952983631","^1F","~m1765540295918","^1G","","^1H",null,"^1I","page1","^1J",null,"^1K",null]]],"downloadPdfDocument",["^0",["^ ","n","pluginTemplate","v",["^ ","id","downloadPdfDocument","^17",null,"^18",null,"^19","datasource","^1:","JavascriptQuery","^1;",null,"^1<","JavascriptQuery","^1=",null,"^1>",["^1?",["queryRefreshTime","","allowedGroupIds",["^A",[]],"streamResponse",false,"lastReceivedFromResourceAt",null,"isFunction",false,"functionParameters",null,"queryDisabledMessage","","servedFromCache",false,"offlineUserQueryInputs","","functionDescription",null,"successMessage","","queryDisabled","","playgroundQuerySaveId","latest","workflowParams",null,"resourceNameOverride","","runWhenModelUpdates",false,"workflowRunExecutionType","sync","showFailureToaster",true,"query","// First, trigger the query to get all rules
const queryResult = await get_all_rules.trigger();

// Use the result directly instead of waiting for state propagation
const rows = formatDataAsArray(queryResult || {});

// Helper function to format date as dd-mm-yyyy
function formatDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const year = date.getFullYear();
  return `${day}-${month}-${year}`;
}

// Helper function to format text with indented paragraphs (except first)
function formatText(text) {
  if (!text) return '';
  const lines = text.split('\n');
  let result = '';

  for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    const trimmed = lines[i].trim();
    if (!trimmed) {
      result += '<br>';
    } else if (i === 0) {
      result += trimmed;
    } else {
      result += '<br><span style="display:inline-block; padding-left:80px;">' + trimmed + '</span>';
    }
  }
  return result;
}

// Build HTML for PDF generation
let htmlContent = `
  <h1 style="text-align:center; font-family:Arial; font-size:18pt; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:24px;">
    ПРАВИЛА МИГИПА
  </h1>
`;

if (!rows.length) {
  htmlContent += '<p style="font-family:Arial;">Нет данных для генерации PDF.</p>';
} else {
  let currentSection = null;
  let currentSubsection = null;

  for (const row of rows) {
    const sectionHeader = row.section_id + ". " + (row.section_name || '');
    const subsectionHeader = row.section_id + "." + row.rule_type_id + " " + (row.sub_section_name || '');
    const itemNumber = row.section_id + "." + row.rule_type_id + "." + row.id + "." + row.sub_id;
    const text = formatText(row.text || '');
    const code = row.code || '';
    const decision_date = row.decision_date ? formatDate(row.decision_date) : '';

    // Build code and date string - include both if available
    let codeAndDate = '';
    if (code && decision_date) {
      codeAndDate = "(" + code + " " + decision_date + ") ";
    } else if (decision_date) {
      codeAndDate = "(" + decision_date + ") ";
    } else if (code) {
      codeAndDate = "(" + code + ") ";
    }

    // Add section header if changed
    if (currentSection !== sectionHeader) {
      currentSection = sectionHeader;
      currentSubsection = null; // Reset subsection when section changes
      htmlContent += `
        <h2 style="font-family:Arial; font-size:16pt; font-weight:bold; margin-top:24px; margin-bottom:12px;">
          ${sectionHeader}
        </h2>
      `;
    }

    // Add subsection header if changed
    if (currentSubsection !== subsectionHeader) {
      currentSubsection = subsectionHeader;
      htmlContent += `
        <h3 style="font-family:Arial; font-size:14pt; font-weight:bold; margin-top:18px; margin-bottom:8px;">
          ${subsectionHeader}
        </h3>
      `;
    }

    // Add item with indent for sub_id > 0
    const itemIndent = row.sub_id > 0 ? 'padding-left:40px;' : '';
    htmlContent += `
      <div style="font-family:Arial; font-size:12pt; margin-bottom:12px; ${itemIndent}">
        <span style="font-weight:bold;">${itemNumber}</span>
        ${codeAndDate ? `<span style="font-style:italic;">${codeAndDate}</span>` : ''}
        ${text}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

const fileName = `ПРАВИЛА МИГИПА`;

// Create a complete HTML document
const fullHtmlDocument = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>${fileName}</title>
  <style>
    body { 
      margin: 0; 
      padding: 20px; 
      font-family: Arial, sans-serif; 
    }
    @media print {
      body { 
        margin: 0; 
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  ${htmlContent}
</body>
</html>`;

// Download the HTML file - use 'html' as the file type (not 'text/html')
await utils.downloadFile(fullHtmlDocument, fileName, 'html');

return {
  success: true,
  message: 'HTML файл скачан. Откройте его в браузере и используйте Печать > Сохранить как PDF.',
  fileName: fileName,
  rowCount: rows.length     message: 'No categories selected',

    rule_uid: ruleUid,

  insertedCount: categoryIds.length,

  r.rule_uid,
  r.id,
  r.sub_id,
  r.status_id,
  r.decision_body_id,
  r.decision_date,
  r.decision_note,
  r.persona,
  r.text,
  d.code,
  d.name
FROM rules r
LEFT JOIN decision_bodies d ON d.id = r.decision_body_id
LEFT JOIN rule_applies_to rat ON rat.rule_uid = r.rule_uid

  r.group_id = {{ group_select.value }}
  
  AND (

GROUP BY r.rule_uid, r.id, r.sub_id, r.status_id, r.decision_body_id, r.decision_date, r.decision_note, r.persona, r.text, d.name, d.code

","id","handleLogin","^17",null,"^18",null,"^19","datasource","^1:","JavascriptQuery","^1;",null,"^1<","JavascriptQuery","^1=",null,"^1>",["^1?",["queryRefreshTime","","allowedGroupIds",["^A",[]],"streamResponse",false,"lastReceivedFromResourceAt",null,"isFunction",false,"functionParameters",null,"queryDisabledMessage","","servedFromCache",false,"offlineUserQueryInputs","","functionDescription",null,"successMessage","","queryDisabled","","playgroundQuerySaveId","latest","workflowParams",null,"resourceNameOverride","","runWhenModelUpdates",false,"workflowRunExecutionType","sync","showFailureToaster",true,"query","// Reset validateLogin to clear old data
validateLogin.reset();

// Trigger the login validation query and wait for it to complete
const result = await validateLogin.trigger();

// The trigger() method returns the data directly
const hasData = result &&
result.id &&
Array.isArray(result.id) &&
result.id.length > 0 &&
result.id[0] !== null &&
result.id[0] !== undefined;

if (hasData) {
  const userData = {
    id: result.id[0],
    email: result.email[0],
    name: result.name[0],
    category: result.category[0] || null,
    user_group_id: result.user_group_id[0],
    group_name: result.group_name[0] };


  // Store in localStorage to persist across pages
  localStorage.setValue('currentUser', userData);
  localStorage.setValue('isLoggedIn', true);

  // Also set in page variables for immediate use
  currentUser.setValue(userData);
  isLoggedIn.setValue(true);

  // Clear login fields
  loginPassword.clearValue();
  loginEmail.clearValue();

  // Wait a bit for the state to propagate
  await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 100));

  // Manually trigger queries to ensure they run with new user context
  try {
    await Promise.all([
    get_full_section.trigger(),
    get_personal.trigger()]);

  } catch (error) {
    console.log('Query trigger error (non-fatal):', error);
  }

  return {
    success: true,
    message: 'Успешный вход',
    user: userData };

} else {
  // Clear any stale data
  localStorage.setValue('currentUser', null);
  localStorage.setValue('isLoggedIn', false);
  currentUser.setValue(null);
  isLoggedIn.setValue(false);

  return {
    success: false,
    message: 'Неверный email или пароль' };

Retrieves all active rules for PDF generation, filtered by user category if not admin
SELECT
  s.name AS section_name,
  rt.name AS sub_section_name,
  r.section_id,
  r.rule_type_id,
  r.id,
  r.sub_id,
  r.decision_date,
  r.text,
  d.code
FROM rules r
LEFT JOIN decision_bodies d ON d.id = r.decision_body_id
LEFT JOIN rule_applies_to rat ON rat.rule_uid = r.rule_uid
LEFT JOIN sections s ON s.id = r.section_id
LEFT JOIN rule_types rt ON rt.id = r.rule_type_id
WHERE 
  r.status_id = 1
  AND r.group_id = 1
  AND (
    {{ currentUser.value.user_group_id === 1 }}
    OR rat.applies_to_id = {{ currentUser.value.category }}
  )

format date as dd-mm-yyyy
function formatDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const year = date.getFullYear();
  return day + "-" + month + "-" + year;
}

// Helper function to format text with indented paragraphs
function formatText(text, itemIndentPx) {
  if (!text) return '';

  // Split by line breaks
  const lines = text.split('\n');
  let result = '';

  for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    const trimmed = lines[i].trim();

    if (!trimmed) {
      // Empty line
      result += '<br>';
    } else if (i === 0) {
      // First paragraph - wrap with hanging indent for line wrapping
      result += '<div style="text-indent:-' + itemIndentPx + 'px; padding-left:' + itemIndentPx + 'px;">' + trimmed + '</div>';
    } else {
      // Subsequent paragraphs - with full indent
      result += '<div style="padding-left:80px;">' + trimmed + '</div>';
    }
  }

  return result;
}

const rows = formatDataAsArray({{ get_all_personal.data }}) || [];

if (!rows.length) {
  return '<p style="font-family:Arial;">Нет данных для генерации PDF.</p>';
}

// Build HTML for PDF generation
let html = `
  <h1 style="text-align:center; font-family:Arial; font-size:18pt; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:24px;">
    ПЕРСОНАЛЬНЫЕ РЕШЕНИЯ
  </h1>
`;

for (const row of rows) {
  const itemNumber = row.id + ".";
  const code = row.code || '';
  const persona = row.persona || '';
  const decision_date = row.decision_date ? formatDate(row.decision_date) : '';

  // Build code and date string - include both if available
  let codeAndDate = '';
  if (code && decision_date) {
    codeAndDate = "(" + code + " " + decision_date + ") ";
  } else if (decision_date) {
    codeAndDate = "(" + decision_date + ") ";
  } else if (code) {
    codeAndDate = "(" + code + ") ";
  }

  // Calculate indent for text (after item number, persona and date)
  const prefix = itemNumber + " " + persona + " " + codeAndDate;
  const prefixLength = prefix.length * 7; // Approximate pixel width

  const text = formatText(row.text || '', prefixLength);

  // Add item
  html += `
    <div style="font-family:Arial; font-size:12pt; margin-top:24px; margin-bottom:12px;">
      <span style="font-weight:bold;">` + itemNumber + ` ` + persona + `</span>
      ` + (codeAndDate ? `<span style="font-style:italic;">` + codeAndDate + `</span>` : '') + `
      ` + text + `
    </div>
  `;
}

return html;","value","","runBehavior","throttled"]],"^1@",null,"^1A",null,"^1B",null,"^1C",null,"^1D",null,"^1E","","^7","~m1765444743375","^1F","~m1765540332323","^1G","","^1H",null,"^1I","page1","^1J",null,"^1K",null]]],"downloadPdf_personal",["^0",["^ ","n","pluginTemplate","v",["^ ","id","downloadPdf_personal","^17",null,"^18",null,"^19","datasource","^1:","JavascriptQuery","^1;",null,"^1<","JavascriptQuery","^1=",null,"^1>",["^1?",["queryRefreshTime","","allowedGroupIds",["^A",[]],"streamResponse",false,"lastReceivedFromResourceAt",null,"isFunction",false,"functionParameters",null,"queryDisabledMessage","","servedFromCache",false,"offlineUserQueryInputs","","functionDescription",null,"successMessage","","queryDisabled","","playgroundQuerySaveId","latest","workflowParams",null,"resourceNameOverride","","runWhenModelUpdates",false,"workflowRunExecutionType","sync","showFailureToaster",true,"query","// First, trigger the query to get all personal rules with current persona filter
const queryResult = await get_all_personal.trigger();

// Use the result directly instead of waiting for state propagation
const rows = formatDataAsArray(queryResult || {});

// Helper function to format date as dd-mm-yyyy
function formatDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const year = date.getFullYear();
  return `${day}-${month}-${year}`;
}

// Helper function to format text with indented paragraphs (except first)
function formatText(text) {
  if (!text) return '';
  const lines = text.split('\n');
  let result = '';

  for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    const trimmed = lines[i].trim();
    if (!trimmed) {
      result += '<br>';
    } else if (i === 0) {
      result += trimmed;
    } else {
      result += '<br><span style="display:inline-block; padding-left:80px;">' + trimmed + '</span>';
    }
  }
  return result;
}

// Build HTML
let htmlContent = `
  <h1 style="text-align:center; font-family:Arial; font-size:18pt; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:24px;">
    ПЕРСОНАЛЬНЫЕ РЕШЕНИЯ
  </h1>
`;

if (!rows.length) {
  htmlContent += '<p style="font-family:Arial;">Нет данных для генерации PDF.</p>';
} else {
  for (const row of rows) {
    const itemNumber = row.id + ".";
    const text = formatText(row.text || '');
    const code = row.code || '';
    const persona = row.persona || '';
    const decision_date = row.decision_date ? formatDate(row.decision_date) : '';

    let codeAndDate = '';
    if (code && decision_date) {
      codeAndDate = `(${code} ${decision_date}) `;
    } else if (decision_date) {
      codeAndDate = `(${decision_date}) `;
    } else if (code) {
      codeAndDate = `(${code}) `;
    }

    htmlContent += `
      <div style="font-family:Arial; font-size:12pt; margin-top:24px; margin-bottom:12px;">
        <span style="font-weight:bold;">${itemNumber} ${persona}</span>
        ${codeAndDate ? `<span style="font-style:italic;">${codeAndDate}</span>` : ''}
        ${text}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

const fileName = `ПЕРСОНАЛЬНЫЕ РЕШЕНИЯ`;

// Create a complete HTML document
const fullHtmlDocument = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>${fileName}</title>
  <style>
    body { 
      margin: 0; 
      padding: 20px; 
      font-family: Arial, sans-serif; 
    }
    @media print {
      body { 
        margin: 0; 
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  ${htmlContent}
</body>
</html>`;

// Download the HTML file
await utils.downloadFile(fullHtmlDocument, fileName, 'html');

return {
  success: true,
  message: 'HTML файл скачан. Откройте его в браузере и используйте Печать > Сохранить как PDF.',
  fileName: fileName,
  rowCount: rows.length
